item.title: Adobe长期首席执行官在人工智能颠覆浪潮中卸任，股价下跌
item.description: 创意工具公司Adobe周四宣布，长期担任首席执行官的尚塔努·纳拉延将在继任者确定后卸任。受此消息影响，该公司股价在盘后交易中下跌6.5%，市场对其战略的担忧再度升温，因其正面临人工智能带来的颠覆性挑战。【原文：Adobe's longtime CEO Shantanu Narayen will leave his role once a successor is appointed, ​the creative tooling company said on Thursday, sending its shares ‌down 6.5% in extended trading on renewed worries around its strategy as it grapples with AI disruption.】

item.title: 交易日百元油价的破坏力
item.description: 周四全球股市下跌，受油价飙升10%、债券收益率急升及美元走强多重因素冲击，这些迹象均指向消费者、企业及经济增长前景的恶化。【原文：Global stocks fell on Thursday, slammed by a 10% spike in oil prices, spiking bond yields and a stronger dollar, all of which point to a deteriorating outlook for consumers, businesses and economic growth.】

item.title: SentinelOne季度盈利预测因激烈竞争未达预期
item.description: 网络安全公司SentinelOne周四预测季度利润低于华尔街预期，在大型竞争对手激烈竞争和财务领导层更迭的背景下，该公司采取了谨慎立场。【原文：Cybersecurity firm SentinelOne forecast quarterly profit below Wall Street estimates on Thursday, signaling a cautious stance amid intense competition ​from larger rivals and a finance leadership transition.】

item.title: 海洋世界因涉嫌不当处理芝麻街品牌遭起诉
item.description: 非营利组织芝麻街工作室于周四起诉海洋世界主题公园集团，指控其作为"芝麻街"品牌的被许可方，涉嫌拒绝履行合同义务。【原文：SeaWorld Parks & Entertainment ​was sued on ‌Thursday by the nonprofit Sesame ​Workshop over its ​alleged refusal to ⁠honor its contractual ​obligations as the ​licensee of the "Sesame Street" brand.】

item.title: 洛杉矶港执行董事称，作为美国最繁忙的港口，该港基本未受伊朗战争扰乱影响
item.description: 洛杉矶港执行董事吉恩·塞罗卡周四表示，尽管美国和以色列对伊朗的袭击已升级为地区冲突，引发供应链动荡，但作为美国最繁忙的集装箱海港，该港基本未受影响。【原文：The busiest U.S. container seaport in Los Angeles is mostly insulated from supply chain upheaval sparked by U.S.-Israel attacks on Iran that have spiraled into a regional conflict, its executive director Gene Seroka said on Thursday.】

item.title: 分析师称，美国放宽海运限制及释放战略储备油料，仍难缓解加油站的燃油短缺困境。
item.description: 分析师周四表示，美国可能放宽海运限制，加之各国政府史无前例地释放石油储备，或将缓解中东战争爆发以来美国及其他地区消费者在加油站承受的痛苦，但无法彻底解决问题。【原文：A potential waiver to U.S. shipping restrictions and a record ​release of oil stockpiles by world governments might slow the pain consumers in the U.S. and elsewhere have ‌suffered at the gasoline pumps since the start of the Middle East war, but will not end it, analysts said on Thursday.】

item.title: 加拿大、墨西哥称三边协议是美墨加协定审议谈判的关键
item.description: 加拿大和墨西哥官员周四重申，维持三国自由贸易协定的重要性，尽管华盛顿方面释放出可能寻求双边协议的信号。【原文：Canadian and Mexican officials on Thursday reaffirmed the importance of ​maintaining the trilateral free trade agreement between their ‌countries and the U.S., amid signals from Washington it could be interested in bilateral deals.】

item.title: 交易所反对美国财政部可能干预原油期货市场
item.description: 包括芝加哥商品交易所集团和多伦多证券交易所母公司TMX集团在内的多家顶级交易所负责人，反对美国政府对原油期货市场采取任何潜在干预措施。当前伊朗冲突引发能源价格持续攀升。【原文：The heads of a number of top exchanges, including CME Group and Toronto Stock Exchange parent TMX Group , oppose any potential ​intervention from the U.S. government involving the oil futures market, amid ‌rising energy prices in the aftermath of the Iran conflict.】

item.title: 美国空军将领称波音需解决加油机问题后美方才考虑追加订单
item.description: 美国空军副参谋长约翰·拉蒙塔涅将军在3月4日的听证会上向议员们表示，波音公司必须先解决其KC-46空中加油机存在的问题，美国才会追加订单。【原文：Boeing has to fix ongoing problems with its KC-46 aerial refueling tanker before the United States orders more, U.S. Air Force Vice Chief of Staff Gen. John Lamontagne ​told lawmakers during a March 4 hearing.】

item.title: 美国能源部将投资19亿美元用于电网升级
item.description: 美国能源部周四宣布，将投资约19亿美元加速升级国内电网。【原文：The U.S. Department of Energy will invest ​about $1.9 billion to accelerate upgrades of ‌power grids in the country, it said on Thursday.】

item.title: 解读：什么是巴塞尔协议？为何争议不断？
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普领导的银行监管机构将于本月公布一项全面资本规则的新草案，该规则将彻底改革大型银行的风险评估方式，进而改变它们为吸收潜在损失而必须预留的资金规模。【原文：U.S. President Donald Trump's bank regulators will unveil this month a new draft of sweeping capital rules that would overhaul how big banks gauge their risks and in turn the funds they must put aside to absorb potential losses.】

item.title: 美国海关机构称关税退税系统完成率在40%至80%之间
item.description: 美国政府为退还1660亿美元非法关税及利息而设立的四阶段系统，目前完成进度在40%至80%之间。海关高级官员周四提交的法庭文件显示。【原文：The U.S. ‌government's four-part system for refunding $166 billion in illegal tariff payments ​with interest is between ​40% and 80% complete, according ⁠to a court filing ​on Thursday from a top ​customs official.】

item.title: Telus表示正在调查其系统遭黑客攻击事件
item.description: 加拿大电信及商业服务公司Telus周四表示，该公司正在调查一起涉及部分系统遭未经授权访问的网络安全事件。【原文：Canadian telecommunications and business services firm Telus is investigating a ​cybersecurity incident involving unauthorized access to some of its ‌systems, a company spokesperson said on Thursday.】

item.title: 智利与美国谋求在关键矿产和稀土领域开展合作
item.description: 智利外交部周四表示，智利与美国已签署联合声明，将就关键矿产和稀土问题展开磋商。【原文：Chile and the United States ​have signed a joint statement to begin discussions on critical ‌minerals and rare earths, Chile's foreign ministry said on Thursday.】

item.title: 亚马逊旗下公司退出无人机行业协会，引发安全担忧
item.description: 亚马逊旗下无人机部门Prime Air宣布退出商业无人机联盟，称其安全顾虑与该组织立场存在分歧。【原文：Amazon.com drone unit Prime Air is ​withdrawing from the Commercial Drone ‌Alliance, saying it had safety concerns that were incompatible ​with the group's positions.】

item.title: 彭博社告知迪拜及海湾地区员工可暂时离开该地区
item.description: 彭博社发言人周四向路透社透露，随着伊朗对海湾城市发动多次袭击，该公司已通知驻海湾地区的员工——包括迪拜区域总部员工——可暂时迁离该地区远程办公。【原文：Bloomberg has told ​employees based in the Gulf, including at its Dubai regional headquarters, they can temporarily ‌relocate and work from outside the region, a spokesperson told Reuters on Thursday, as Iran carries out repeated attacks on Gulf cities.】

item.title: 意大利对意联银行处以1800万欧元罚款，因其非法处理客户数据
item.description: 意大利数据保护机构周四宣布，已对该国最大银行意联银行处以1760万欧元罚款，因其擅自将约240万客户数据转移至旗下数字银行Isybank，构成非法数据处理行为。【原文：Italy's data protection authority said on Thursday ​it had fined Italy's biggest bank ‌Intesa Sanpaolo 17.6 million euros for illicit processing of data of around 2.4 million customers the ​bank unilaterally moved to its digital unit Isybank.】

item.title: 迪士尼任命资深人士保罗·罗德担任传播主管
item.description: 华特迪士尼公司周四宣布，任命在公司服务25年的资深员工保罗·罗德为高级执行副总裁兼首席传播官，该任命将于3月19日生效。【原文：Walt Disney has named 25-year company veteran Paul Roeder as senior ​executive vice president and chief communications ‌officer, effective March 19, the media giant said on Thursday.】

item.title: 美国驻加拿大大使称，美国在与加拿大的贸易谈判中面临逆风
item.description: 美国驻加拿大大使皮特·霍克斯特拉表示，华盛顿希望续签《美墨加贸易协定》，但面临加拿大方面的阻力，这凸显出在7月1日强制性审查临近之际存在不确定性。【原文：U.S. Ambassador to Canada Pete Hoekstra said Washington wants to renew the U.S.-Mexico-Canada trade pact but faces resistance from Canada, ​underscoring uncertainty as a mandatory July 1 review approaches.】

item.title: 加拿大最大交易所推动终止所有企业的季度报告制度
item.description: 运营多伦多证券交易所的TMX集团正与加拿大监管机构磋商，力推新规允许所有企业每半年发布一次财报，而非按季度披露。此举与美国正在推进的类似举措相呼应。【原文：TMX Group , which operates the Toronto Stock Exchange, is in talks ​with Canadian regulators to push through new rules that will allow all companies to report earnings every six months, instead ‌of on a quarterly basis, mirroring a similar effort underway in the United States.】

item.title: 芝加哥商品交易所的达菲表示，预测市场需要加强监管，制定更明确的规则。
item.description: 预测市场——过去一年美国最热门的资产类别之一——需要更严格的监管规则，明确区分基于结果的金融合约与实质上属于赌博的事件投注，某大型交易所运营商负责人对路透社表示。【原文：Prediction markets - one of the hottest U.S. asset classes over the ‌past year - need tighter rules that clearly separate outcome-based financial contracts from event wagers that amount to gambling, the head of a major exchange operator told Reuters.】

item.title: 美国上诉法院撤销针对加州儿童网络安全法的大部分禁令
item.description: 联邦上诉法院周四撤销了大部分禁令，此前该禁令曾阻止加利福尼亚州执行一项旨在保护儿童免受社交媒体及其他可能对其身心造成伤害的网络内容侵害的州法律。【原文：A federal appeals ​court on Thursday threw out most of an ‌injunction that had blocked California from enforcing a state law meant to shield children from social media and other online content ​that could harm them mentally or physically.】

item.title: 微软体验与设备部门负责人拉杰什·贾宣布退休
item.description: 微软高管拉杰什·贾（Rajesh Jha）周四宣布退休，结束了在该公司长达三十余年的职业生涯。他曾负责监督包括Windows系统及Microsoft 365应用（如Word和Teams）在内的多项产品。【原文：Rajesh Jha, a key Microsoft executive overseeing products including Windows and Microsoft ​365 apps like Word and ‌Teams, announced his retirement on Thursday after more than three decades with the company.】

item.title: 伊朗战争给汇丰和渣打银行的中东扩张计划蒙上阴影
item.description: 就在美国和以色列对伊朗发动袭击的前几天，汇丰银行首席执行官乔治·埃尔赫德里表示，亚洲-中东走廊正成为"全球增长的关键轴心"。【原文：Just days before the U.S. and Israel launched strikes on Iran, HSBC's CEO Georges Elhedery said the Asia-Middle East corridor was becoming "a ​defining axis of global growth".】

item.title: 据彭博社报道，Stellantis正寻求与中国汽车制造商达成协议，吸引其投资其业务。
item.description: 据彭博社周四报道，Stellantis正与多家中国汽车制造商洽谈合作，这些企业将投资菲亚特母公司陷入困境的欧洲业务。【原文：Stellantis is exploring deals with ​Chinese carmakers through ‌which they would invest in the ​Fiat owner's struggling ​European operations, Bloomberg News ⁠reported on ​Thursday.】

item.title: 美国商品监管机构启动预测市场规则制定工作
item.description: 美国商品期货交易委员会周四就一项监管提案公开征求意见，该提案将塑造政府对蓬勃发展的事件合约和预测市场监管框架。【原文：The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission on Thursday called for public comment ahead of a regulatory proposal ​it said would shape government oversight of the burgeoning market for ‌events contracts and prediction markets.】

item.title: 美国民主党人敦促加强《美墨加协定》对华商品及墨西哥工厂的监管
item.description: 美国民主党参议员鲁本·加列戈周四敦促特朗普政府重新谈判北美贸易协定，以确保中国无法通过其在墨西哥的工厂对美国制造商造成新的"冲击"。【原文：The U.S. must renegotiate the North American trade deal to ensure that China cannot inflict a new "shock" to U.S. manufacturers via Chinese-owned factories in Mexico, ​Democratic Senator Ruben Gallego urged the Trump administration on Thursday.】

item.title: 新加坡将就特朗普的贸易调查与美国贸易代表办公室展开磋商
item.description: 新加坡贸易与工业部周四表示，该国将与美国贸易代表办公室（USTR）进行沟通，就贸易数据及301条款调查寻求进一步澄清。【原文：Singapore will engage with the Office of the United States ​Trade Representative (USTR) to seek further clarification on trade ‌data and section 301 investigations, the country's ministry of trade and industry said on Thursday.】

item.title: Lucid发布双座无人驾驶出租车概念车，并推出自动驾驶技术订阅服务
item.description: Lucid在周四的投资者日活动上展示了一款双座无人驾驶出租车概念车，该车没有踏板和方向盘，并宣布为其电动汽车推出自动驾驶技术订阅服务。【原文：Lucid showcased a ​two-seater robotaxi ‌concept without pedals and ​a ​steering wheel and announced ⁠a ​self-driving tech ​subscription for its electric vehicles ​at its ​investor day event ‌on ⁠Thursday.】

item.title: Rivian将于今年春季启动R2车型交付，首发版本售价5.8万美元
item.description: Rivian将于今年春季开始交付其更实惠的R2系列SUV，其中一款车型定价57,990美元，并计划在2027年推出更低价位选项。这家电动汽车制造商正致力于扩大客户群体，以挑战特斯拉最畅销的Model Y车型。【原文：Rivian will begin delivering its more affordable R2 line of SUVs this spring with ‌a variant priced at $57,990 and roll out cheaper options in 2027, as the electric vehicle maker looks to widen its customer base and take on Tesla's best-selling Model Y.】
